name: APIpulse LLM Pricing API
description: Free JSON API for real-time LLM API pricing data. Compare costs across 48 models from 10 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Mistral, Cohere, Meta, Moonshot, xAI, AI21). No API key required. CORS enabled.

endpoints.description: Get all model pricing data. Supports ?provider=openai, ?tier=budget, ?model=openai-gpt5 filters.
Calculate monthly cost for a model. Params: model, input_tokens, output_tokens, requests.
Find cheapest model for a workload. Params: input_tokens, output_tokens, requests.
Compare multiple models. Params: models (comma-separated), input_tokens, output_tokens, requests.
Get SVG pricing badge for a model. Param: model.
Get model recommendations. Params: use_case, budget.
